{{CargoOrgan
|name=Eye of the Dreadlion
|type=Bionic
|rank=red
|id=10713
|idx=71
|description="Each human kingdom laid to ruin by the griffons became a living hell. The few who escaped alive had only this to say: Don’t look into its eyes…" — Chronicles of the Griffon
|skill=Before round start, the enemy falls into a magic mirage, reducing the enemy's ATK by 30% this round!
|hp=3670
|def=231
|atk=247
|rush=225
|gene1=Per organ implanted, all ELMT DMG +4
Organs Implanted: 40/40
|gene2=Craft 1 Purple Organ Slime: Gain 1 more by 10%
|gene3=Craft 1 Orange Organ Slime: Gain 1 more by 10%
|gene4=In Gene Sims, Wind DMG +240
|gene5=In Gene Sims, Fire DMG +240
|gene6=In Gene Sims, DMG +12%
|gene7=In Gene Sims, DMG +12% (Awakened)
|}}
